case_title: SEAN I. HARRIS VS. JACK D. RYDER

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-20-2010 - JUDGMENT.

SMALL CLAIMS OEX CALENDAR OF JUN-23-2011 IS CONTINUED TO JUL-14-2011 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT. 506 BENCH LETTER ISSUED. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF. NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (NO SERVICE FEE.) SERVED NOV-29-2010, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT RYDER, JACK D.
ORDER OF EXAMINATION ISSUED AS TO DEFENDANT RYDER, JACK D. HEARING SET FOR JUN-09-2011 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT 506
ORDER OF EXAMINATION ISSUED AS TO DEFENDANT RYDER, JACK D. HEARING SET FOR SEP-12-2016 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT 506
DECLARATION OF NON SERVICE, UNABLE TO SERVE DEFENDANT; FILED BY PLAINTIFF HARRIS, SEAN I.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HARRIS, SEAN I. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT RYDER, JACK D. $1,470.00 PRINCIPAL, $50.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,520.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUN-09-2011 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUN-10-2011 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL.

THE ORDER OF EXAMINATION IS DISCHARGED AS TO DEFENDANT JACK D. RYDER. NO APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF SEAN I. HARRIS OR DEFENDANT JACK D. RYDER. NO PROOF OF SERVICE. NEW OEX FILED 9/7/16 AND SET FOR 11/14/16 AT 11:00 A.M. JUDGE PRO TEM: JOANNE MADDEN. CLERK: K. DOUGHERTY. NOT REPORTED. (D506).
TRIAL RESET TO NOV-29-2010 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506 TRIAL OF NOV-05-2010 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR
EXHIBITS RETURNED TO PLAINTIFF HARRIS, SEAN I.
PROOF OF SERVICE OF SUBPOENA RECEIVED AND FILED.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF DEC-20-2010 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF DEC-20-2010 BY PAUL SLAVIT. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT. PLAINTIFF EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT

SMALL CLAIMS OEX CALENDAR OF JUN-09-2011 IS CONTINUED TO JUN-23-2011 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. DEFENDANT IS TO APPEAR AND PROVIDE 3 MONTHS OF FINANCIAL INFORMATION, RENT, MORTGAGE, CREDIT CARD STATEMENTS, ETC. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT. JDUGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)

SMALL CLAIMS OEX CALENDAR OF JUL-14-2011 IS CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO OCT-13-2011 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. DEFENDANT IS TO MAKE MONTHLY PAYMENTS OF $50.00 PER MONTH ON THE LAST DAY OF THE MONTH BEGINNING JULY 31, 2011 AND TO REPORT BACK WITH FIANACIAL INFORMATION COVERING THE NEXT THREE MONTH PERIOD ON OCTOBER 13, 2011. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT. BENCH LETTER WITHDRAWN. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
PETITION OF JUDGMENT CREDITOR TO SET ASIDE TERMS FOR PAYMENT OF JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF HARRIS, SEAN I. PETITION MAILED ON SEP 01, 2011
ORDER ON PETITION OF JUDGMENT CREDITOR TO SET ASIDE TERMS FOR PAYMENT OF JUDGMENT-**NO OPPOSITION TO PETITION FILED-TERMS FOR PAYMENT ARE HEREBY SET ASIDE**
COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $110.40 ACCRUED INTEREST AS TO DEFENDANT RYDER, JACK D.
WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY FILED BY PLAINTIFF HARRIS, SEAN I. AS TO DEFENDANT RYDER, JACK D.
SMALL CLAIMS OEX CALENDAR OF OCT-13-2011 IS OFF CALENDAR - NO APPEARANCES. JUDGE PRO TEM: ROBERT SHEPPARD. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,410.00 FILED BY HARRIS, SEAN I. AS TO DEFENDANT RYDER, JACK D. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-05-2010 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
DECLARATION OF NON SERVICE-UNABLE TO SERVE; FILED BY PLAINTIFF HARRIS, SEAN I.
TRIAL RESET TO DEC-20-2010 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506 TRIAL OF NOV-29-2010 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR
SUBPOENA DUCES TECUM ISSUED TO JACK D. RYDER
ORDER OF EXAMINATION RETURNED SERVED, SERVICE DATE: APR-19-2011 (OEX - SERVICE FEE $35.00) AS TO DEFENDANT RYDER, JACK D.
WRIT RETURNED WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, UNSATISFIED AS TO DEFENDANT RYDER, JACK D.
ORDER OF EXAMINATION ISSUED AS TO DEFENDANT RYDER, JACK D. HEARING SET FOR NOV-14-2016 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS OEX CALENDAR OF NOV-14-2016 IS OFF CALENDAR - NO APPEARANCES. NO PROOF OF SERVICE OF OEX. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: K. DOUGHERTY. NOT REPORTED. (D506).
